name: KFC Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the cabbage and carrots are chopped into very fine pieces, about the size of rice kernels.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, salt, pepper, milk, mayonnaise, buttermilk, white vinegar, and lemon juice.
3. Beat ingredients until smooth.
4. Add the cabbage and shredded carrot to the mixture and mix well.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
